content.en:
Taboo ancient wells.

The interior space here is huge, presenting a dark silence, and the forbidden rules are intertwined in the void, as if something is still evolving.

Countless True Ancestors entered this space, and the space must not be crowded, and all True Ancestors were like drops of water falling into the sea.

Ye Tian entered the inside of the Forbidden Ancient Well and found that the environment here was suitable for cultivating the Forbidden Body, although it was not as good as the effect of cultivating with the Forbidden Black Lotus, but it was better than the effect of the Nine Shadows Forbidden Pool.

After all, the Nine Secluded Forbidden Pools are only treasures used to improve cultivation, and they are not of much help to the Forbidden Body, but the Forbidden Ancient Well is a naturally born Forbidden Treasure Land, so it can play a role in the Forbidden Body.

Of course, the goal of Ye Tian's trip was still forbidden treasures, otherwise just cultivating here for 100,000 years and 100,000 years would not be of much help.

Soon, people found that the space inside the forbidden ancient well was very distorted, and their divine consciousness was greatly affected, and all kinds of exploration secret techniques were also affected, and they couldn't explore the distance at all.

The internal space of the Forbidden Ancient Well is very similar to the Dark Forbidden Domain, the outer forbidden power is not very strong, but the internal forbidden power is terrifying, so it is more dangerous.

If you don't have enough strength, don't go to the inner area of the Forbidden Ancient Well, otherwise it will be easy to fall into the inner area.

Some of the slightly weaker True Ancestors were looking for forbidden treasures and opportunities on the periphery, while the powerful True Ancestors flew to the inner space of the Forbidden Ancient Well one after another.

They know that staying in the outer space is a waste of time, so they naturally seize the time to enter the inner space.

......

At this time, the True Ancestors who dared to enter the internal space basically had the strength of the top True Ancestors, and very few elite True Ancestors dared to enter the internal space.

And Ye Tian and the Blood Demon General were separated, otherwise they would have found forbidden treasures, and they would not be easy to distinguish between them.

Interior space.

Ye Tian kept flying, and suddenly there was a slight sound in his ears, as if someone was playing, and as if someone was whispering in his ear.

"Illusion!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is common in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Just ignore it, and if you dwell on this illusion, it's easy to get caught up in it.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian saw the figure of a woman, the other party was standing on a lotus flower and dancing, her graceful body leading to reverie.

Ye Tian didn't stare at the other party's figure, but at the lotus flower under the other party.

This lotus flower is black-gold and grows on a small lake in a black earth.

There is earth, water, and trees inside the forbidden ancient well, but there are very few of these things, and most of them are empty voids.

And this black earth is not big, and the only treasure on it is the lotus flower.

As for the woman, she was not a real woman, because Ye Tian did not detect the existence of the other party with his copying talent.

"It's also an illusion, it's too real, if it weren't for the probing with the Copying Talent, I would have thought it was a real existence!" Ye Tian muttered.

He could see through the woman's true identity, but no one else could.

However, others may be able to guess that something is wrong, after all, where would normal people appear in the forbidden ancient well!

But if someone underestimates this woman, there will definitely be big trouble.

"The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said that the classics of the Black Wind Mountain also mentioned that when you encounter an illusion in the Dark Forbidden Domain, you must not provoke it, otherwise you will encounter something terrifying. When it's serious, even the Domain Ancestor will fall!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But a forbidden treasure, and unknown dangers, should he provoke it?

Just as Ye Tian was pondering, in an area in the distance, a Supreme True Ancestor saw a tree, and a fruit was bearing on this tree.

However, there was a giant black snake hovering under the tree.

Seeing that the fruit was a forbidden treasure, this Supreme True Ancestor couldn't help it, and wanted to go up and pick the fruit, and then leave quickly.

However, the big black snake stopped him.

The Supreme True Ancestor then bombarded the black serpent, and then something terrible happened.

I saw that the black snake dissipated and disappeared, turning into wisps of black rules and entering the body of this Supreme True Ancestor.

Soon, countless black streaks appeared on the body of this Supreme True Ancestor, and the consciousness of the whole person began to dissipate.

In less than ten minutes, this Supreme True Ancestor turned into a black sculpture, and his vitality was completely lost.

A Supreme True Ancestor has fallen and died!

......

"I still want to take this forbidden treasure of the lotus type!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, there is also a way to find cannon fodder and use cannon fodder or the enemy's body to induce a great terror, so in a short period of time, the great terror will not happen.

Such a method would undoubtedly sacrifice a strong man, but it was worth it compared to the value of obtaining a forbidden treasure.

Ye Tian can now go and catch a true ancestor and lead to the Great Terror, or he can use his copied body to try the Great Terror.

In the end, Ye Tian decided to use his copied body to elicit the Great Terror.

Wow!

The replica body appeared and walked towards the lotus flower.

I saw that the woman looked at Ye Tian, and a terrifying aura descended, and Ye Tian controlled the copy body to make a move.

Just a knife qi shook it over, directly smashing the woman to pieces.

The next moment, the black rules appeared, ignoring Ye Tian's defenses and entering Ye Tian's body.

Endless fears, endless visions struck.

Ye Tian clearly sensed that this body was being destroyed, as if it had been assimilated into another substance.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian erupted with the invincible True Ancestor's extreme combat power, and the power of the True Ancestor in his body was contending with this great terror, and even the forbidden body was mobilized.

He found that the Forbidden Body had a good effect against this great terror, and in a few minutes, the black rule was completely crushed by Ye Tian.

This replica survived the horror unscathed, and did not fall and die.

The great terror disappeared, and Ye Tian easily snatched this lotus.

Through appraisal, he roughly confirmed the value of this lotus forbidden treasure.

"It's a moderately forbidden curiosity!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Forbidden treasures are divided into forbidden treasures and forbidden treasures, among which forbidden treasures are divided into four levels: low, medium, high and top, and the same is true for forbidden treasures.

However, the forbidden treasures that people often talk about are actually forbidden strange things, and for the treasures of the dark forbidden realm, any of them are considered strange things, they are all precious, and there are almost no useless things.

And Ye Tian's forbidden black lotus is actually a high-level forbidden strange thing, and its value is very high.

"I didn't expect that not long after entering the Forbidden Ancient Well, I harvested a medium forbidden strange thing!" Ye Tian smiled slightly, put away this forbidden strange thing, and then left here.

In the days that followed, there were people who continued to harvest forbidden and strange things, but there were also many True Ancestors who fell in various great horrors.

Gradually, many True Ancestors found a way to deal with the Great Terror, and that was to fill it with the lives of other True Ancestors.

In this way, many True Ancestors with weak strength were unlucky.

Because of this, many forces have contradictions, and they will fight when they meet, and many true ancestors have fallen inside the forbidden ancient well.

In the blink of an eye, half a month has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already harvested dozens of forbidden strange things, most of which were low-level forbidden strange things, but also a high-level forbidden strange thing.

That high-level forbidden strange object was actually not found by Ye Tian, but obtained from a true ancestor.

When that True Ancestor was about to deal with a peak master of Black Wind Mountain, he was rushed by Ye Tian and killed him directly, and the other party had a high-level forbidden strange object on his body.

So many True Ancestors poured into the Forbidden Ancient Well, and after so many days, the number of forbidden strange things was very small, and it could even be said that there were not many left.

For example, Ye Tian has not gained much in the past two days!

Suddenly.

The bloody general sent a message: "General Nine Extremes, the Heavenly Sword Sect's Changfeng Sword Venerable has obtained a forbidden treasure and is fleeing to the forbidden ancient well!"

"What, Forbidden Arcana!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

I don't know how many times the value of the forbidden treasure is higher than the forbidden treasure!

A low-level forbidden treasure is at least comparable to dozens of top-level forbidden strange things, but now Ye Tian hasn't even found a top-level forbidden strange thing, which shows how rare the top-level forbidden strange thing is.

And Changfeng Sword Venerable got a forbidden treasure, this luck is too good, it is simply the son of luck in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm!

But Ye Tian also knew very well that if the Changfeng Sword Venerable obtained the forbidden treasure and no one found it, it would be real luck, but if he was discovered, it would be a disaster.

At this moment, there were definitely many Invincible True Ancestors who would go after him.

The value of a forbidden treasure is too high and too high, and at a critical moment, I am afraid that even those sleeping Dao ancestors will pay a huge price to come out and forcibly snatch this forbidden treasure.

"I wonder if this forbidden treasure can lead to the mastermind behind the destruction of the Heavenly Spirit Sect?"

Ye Tian muttered.
